programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
programme.desc: As the Fourth of July nears, satellite engineer David Levinson (Jeff Goldblum) investigates a 3,000-mile-wide mother ship that's approaching Earth. Fortunately, 20 years earlier, nations across the world started to use recovered extraterrestrial technology to develop an immense defense program. When the alien invaders attack with unprecedented force, the U.S. president, teams of scientists and brave fighter pilots spring into action to save the planet from a seemingly invincible enemy.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After climatologist Jack Hall is largely ignored by U.N. officials when presenting his environmental concerns, his research proves true when a superstorm develops, setting off catastrophic natural disasters throughout the world; trying to get to his son, Sam, who is trapped in New York with his friend Laura and others, Jack and his crew must travel by foot from Philadelphia, braving the elements, to get to Sam before it's too late.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Martian
programme.desc: When astronauts blast off from the planet Mars, they leave behind Mark Watney, presumed dead after a fierce storm. With only a meager amount of supplies, the stranded visitor must utilize his wits and spirit to find a way to survive on the hostile planet. Meanwhile, back on Earth, members of NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home, while his crew mates hatch their own plan for a daring rescue mission.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Horizon Line
programme.desc: Former couple Sara and Jackson board a single-engine plane for a routine and casual flight to their friend's tropical island wedding. However, within minutes after takeoff, their pilot suffers a fatal heart attack, leaving them with no idea where they are, and no clue how to land the plane. With nothing but miles of ocean and sky in every direction, and a terrifying storm that's about to envelop them, Sara and Jackson have only one shot -- and there's no going back.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mr. Frisby impresses quite a few people with his vivid imagination.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The disreputable patter of a used-car dealer changes when he buys a haunted car from an old man and finds he is suddenly unable to lie to his customers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: At the Dachau concentration camp, a former Nazi is tried by a phantom jury of his tortured victims.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A book about thought gives a clerk the power to accomplish anything just by willing it, leaving him free to create an ideal world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Librarian Romney Wordsworth is condemned to death for obsolescence.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy tells a prizefighter that he will make a wish for him to win his comeback fight.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Old Ben has the strange power to change himself into anything, or anyone, he wants.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An obsessed Oliver Crangle (Theodore Bikel) tells an FBI agent that a drastic transformation will take place on all the evil people in the world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A small-time hoodlum gets killed by the police during a robbery and finds an afterlife where he can have anything he wants.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain (Idris Elba), the last Gunslinger, is locked in an eternal battle with Walter O'Dim (Matthew McConaughey), also known as the Man in Black. The Gunslinger must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together. With the fate of worlds at stake, two men collide in the ultimate battle between good and evil.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: I Am Number Four
programme.desc: John Smith (Alex Pettyfer) seems like an ordinary teenager, but he is an alien on the run from merciless enemies hunting him and the eight others like him. Always changing his identity and moving to different towns with his guardian, Henri (Timothy Olyphant), John has no real past and no true home. However, in the small Ohio town where he now lives, he discovers love, powerful new abilities, and a connection to others of his kind.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

Meanwhile, back on Earth, members of NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home, while his crew mates hatch their own plan for a daring rescue mission.

The Gunslinger must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together. programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After climatologist Jack Hall is largely ignored by U.N. officials when presenting his environmental concerns, his research proves true when a superstorm develops, setting off catastrophic natural disasters throughout the world; trying to get to his son, Sam, who is trapped in New York with his friend Laura and others, Jack and his crew must travel by foot from Philadelphia, braving the elements, to get to Sam before it's too late.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: When U.S. government operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) and his mentor, Jim Phelps (Jon Voight), go on a covert assignment that takes a disastrous turn, Jim is killed, and Ethan becomes the prime murder suspect. Now a fugitive, Hunt recruits brilliant hacker Luther Stickell (Ving Rhames) and maverick pilot Franz Krieger (Jean Reno) to help him sneak into a heavily guarded CIA building to retrieve a confidential computer file that will prove his innocence.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Tom Cruise returns to his role as Ethan Hunt in the second installment of "Mission: Impossible." This time Ethan Hunt leads his IMF team on a mission to capture a deadly German virus before it is released by terrorists. His mission is made impossible due to the fact that he is not the only person after samples of the disease. He must also contest with a gang of international terrorists headed by a turned bad former IMF agent who has already managed to steal the cure.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: John Smith (Alex Pettyfer) seems like an ordinary teenager, but he is an alien on the run from merciless enemies hunting him and the eight others like him. Always changing his identity and moving to different towns with his guardian, Henri (Timothy Olyphant), John has no real past and no true home. However, in the small Ohio town where he now lives, he discovers love, powerful new abilities, and a connection to others of his kind.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Apparently benign alien emissaries show mankind how to end the misery of war, plague and famine.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Last Night of a Jockey
programme.desc: A jockey's wish to become a giant in his profession has repercussions he may regret. With Mickey Rooney.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Driving cross-country, a girl keeps seeing the same hitchhiker on the road ahead, beckoning her toward a fatal accident.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut returns from a 30-year mission to find that his girlfriend hasn't aged at all.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man named Williams accidentally crashes his aircraft near a small Mexican village.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman battles two miniature aliens from another planet in a battle of size vs. scientific weapons. With Agnes Moorehead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman's natural beauty makes her a freak in a futuristic society.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Professor Fowler, a well-liked teacher at a boys school, is asked by the trustees to end his teaching career.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man considers several possibilities when he is offered one wish by a genie in a magic lamp. With Jack Albertson.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Jupiter Ascending
programme.desc: Jupiter Jones (Mila Kunis) was born under signs that predicted future greatness, but her reality as a woman consists of cleaning other people's houses and endless bad breaks. Caine (Channing Tatum), a genetically engineered hunter, arrives on Earth to locate her, making Jupiter finally aware of the great destiny that awaits her: Jupiter's genetic signature marks her as the next in line for an extraordinary inheritance that could alter the balance of the cosmos.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger and his father head to their hunting cabin, hoping for a quiet weekend. Instead, they find themselves in a kill-or-be-killed stand for survival when they encounter a gang of ruthless drug traffickers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Knock at the Cabin
programme.desc: While vacationing at a remote cabin in the woods, a young girl and her parents are taken hostage by four armed strangers who demand they make an unthinkable choice to avert the apocalypse. Confused, scared and with limited access to the outside world, the family must decide what they believe before all is lost.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: Quan is a humble London businessman whose long-buried past erupts in a revenge-fueled vendetta when the only person left for him to love -- his teenage daughter -- dies in a senseless act of politically motivated terrorism. His relentless search to find the terrorists leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose own past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: When U.S. government operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) and his mentor, Jim Phelps (Jon Voight), go on a covert assignment that takes a disastrous turn, Jim is killed, and Ethan becomes the prime murder suspect. Now a fugitive, Hunt recruits brilliant hacker Luther Stickell (Ving Rhames) and maverick pilot Franz Krieger (Jean Reno) to help him sneak into a heavily guarded CIA building to retrieve a confidential computer file that will prove his innocence.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Tom Cruise returns to his role as Ethan Hunt in the second installment of "Mission: Impossible." This time Ethan Hunt leads his IMF team on a mission to capture a deadly German virus before it is released by terrorists. His mission is made impossible due to the fact that he is not the only person after samples of the disease. He must also contest with a gang of international terrorists headed by a turned bad former IMF agent who has already managed to steal the cure.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Retired from active duty, and training recruits for the Impossible Mission Force, agent Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) faces the toughest foe of his career: Owen Davian (Philip Seymour Hoffman), an international broker of arms and information, who is as cunning as he is ruthless. Davian emerges to threaten Hunt and all that he holds dear -- including the woman Hunt loves.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
